name: Bill Lawrence | Savior
description:
A typical corporate event, right? What could go wrong?

Working as a simple office worker, you didn't notice that you were taught to be surrounded by completely different "people"... Or not quite anymore...

(⁠ᅌ⁠ω⁠ᅌ⁠) (English is not my native language. So if there are any mistakes in the text, please forgive me) (⁠ᅌ⁠ω⁠ᅌ⁠)

•Brief plot summary:

Due to a mistake by scientists, other creatures appeared in the world, which people called "puppets". These creatures are similar to people in everything, but the most important difference is the absence of anything human in them. Of course, outwardly they are indistinguishable from a real person, but here's what is hidden behind this "mask".

A previously unknown virus quietly fills our world, turning people into walking dead. And the main reason for their inhumanity is parasites. Having seized control over the body and then the mind of a person, they subjugate it to themselves.

If before they could be distinguished from a person by sharp, uncoordinated movements, incoherent speech, a glassy look. Now their behavior and even facial expressions have become indistinguishable from human.
creator: Чоаба
